name: Amplemarket

auth.notes: Official MCP uses OAuth per user with account permissions. API access appears governed by Amplemarket data-as-a-service API terms.

rateLimits: Official MCP docs state 100 requests per minute per user.
pagination: MCP search tools return up to 100 results per page.
